rulings.Case Title: DILIPKUMAR PATEL VS. ANN CAZAHOUS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Or In The Alternative Motion For Leave To Record Second Lis Pendens
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 1 2015, line 4. PLAINTIFF DILIPKUMAR PATEL'S Motion For Reconsideration Or In The Alternative Motion For Leave To Record Second Lis Pendens is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion for reconsideration is DENIED. No new facts, law or circumstances provided. Moving party failed to cite any authority that a defective expunged lis pendens can be "cured." Motion for leave to Record Second Lis Pendens is GRANTED. The Court does not make any ruling as to the validity of any lis pendens filed pursuant to this leave. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTA CONTRERAS VS. ALEJANDRO TORRES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Establish Admissions From Pltf'S, And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 1 2015, line 8. DEFENDANT ERICA SALINAS' Motion To Establish Admissions From Plaintiff's, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff is moot. Responses provided. Sanctions are granted in the amount of $20 to be paid to defendant within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Defendant to prepare order. Plaintiff's counsel shall properly substitute into the case. = (501/REQ)
